item.title: "Quick! quick! ..."
item.description:
Quick! quick! The cat's been sick.
Where? where? Under the chair.
Hasten! hasten! Fetch the basin.
Alack! alack! It is too late,
The carpet's in An awful state.
No! no! It's all in vain,
For she has licked it Up again.
SOURCE: https://www.instagram.com/shouxin13141/?hl=en
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Some tips. A myriad of responses, if even one helps one person, that's enough.
item.description:
Credit to ONeRadLatina on IG
Leaving an abusive partner, family, community, state, country, is not as easy as the internet comments may make it seem. Building what we have, where we have it, begins to change the sociocultural landscape around us.
Community is important. Passions, crafts, sports, whatever community you have, dive in.
Self defense is subjective. Jiujitsu, self defense class, pepper spray, concealed carry, a charming smile and making a friend, all are ranges of feeling safe.
Spread our online footprint. Make anonymous accounts to track and post political news, and separate accounts for when we need our oxytocin.
Nothing makes them madder than enjoying yourself and minding your own business. Joy is an act of resistance.
Leaving politics on mute leaves our head in the sand, on surprise headlines blindsiding us. It's like turning the weather channel off before hurricane/fire/tornado season.
Not fun conversations, but important ones. Knowing what neighbors are safe, what options we have, prepping to be nimble and adaptive lend a sense of planning, security.
Cheers all. Find some joy. Share some joy. Thank you, appreciate you.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: MRW I just got back from advanced voting. JUST SAY NO TO PP!
item.description: Go Canada Go!!!
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants

item.title: 50501 SLC Protest posters
item.description:
Had a hard time getting a picture of this one. "Donald Trump Patron Saint of Idiots"
Preach
This one's my favorite
Second favorite
I tried really hard to keep faces out of these images. Don't want to be responsible for anyone getting rounded up. Had about 30,000 people at the protest. Best part was when a news helicopter flew over everyone turned their posters to the sky and started chanting, "Fuck Donald Trump." We also changed "Fuck Mike Lee" 'cause fuck that guy. Be kind to each other.

item.title: The defeat of fascism
item.description: In Finland: the racist far-right party Perussuomalaiset lost more than half of their votes in municipal election compared with last time. They have been in government for two years. Their administration has severely reduced social security, 50k people have lost their jobs and they've even made the homelessness rate go up for the first time in 11 years. Couple of years ago they were super popular and won big in the election of the parliament, and then f*cked up (as expected). In the photo above you can see their faces as the votes have been counted and published. I think this is one of the most beautiful pictures I've seen in years.
item.dc:creator: MiffyFin

item.title: Phone clearing dumparoo
item.description:
It's so fluffy!!!
Ahhhhhh.....
I've got your nose
My cabbages!
7
I'm single ladies...as you can tell
$20 is $20
Makes me wana hotdog real bad
Landlady, the definition of F around and find out
*Pillsbury Doughboy laugh*
Truth
I assure you it is, no Rx needed
Talking Heads Psycho Killer was mine. Please comment below with yours.
Hehe, 800813
The cheeto and his family playing golf I'd imagine
Please leave a message after the blasphemy....
Shut up and take my money!
I felt this to the Core, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank and the always amazing Mr. Delroy Lindo.
45 and I still do
Ahhhhhhhhh...*deep breath*.....Ahhhhhhhhhh
That better be a dry fire...is what his wife probably was thinking 8 yrs ago
Please and thank you, Sir
I bet you counted you lil perv you *blush*
Logic
And garlic butter from your right....
I failed, but it was glorious
If you laughed you showed your age
And proud of it
Goeth well, Felicia
Aww....*limps away*
Act like a clown, get capped like a clown
I guess his he-man underoos were in the laundry
I have yet to meet one
Be fruitful and multiple with yourself over there Thank you to my imgur fam. I love you all.

item.description: A leader of the free world doesn't do shit like this and get away with it! Why is it happening here?

item.title: Nellie, a senior dog, became lonely when her owner went to work. To keep her company, she fostered Crush, and they became best friends and Crush became a foster fail because they couldn’t be separated.

item.title: How to spot a trans person...
item.description: Live your life like you are one of the Addams. Be decent, loving, and remember to dig up old friends now and again.

item.title: This always cracks me up.
item.description: As someone who was not in the wrong and a state trooper giving me a ticket for an accident I didnt cause. It was DAMN SATISFYING to see the judge practically reprimanded the state trooper in front of a packed room of people when I was presenting my case and thankfully a kind soul decided to be my witness to my court date.

We stand together or surly we hang alone
Talk to your neighbors and friends. And their friends and neighbors. Organize and do not surrender

item.title: Not a good day
item.description: I’m exhausted from all the emotions. Thank you so much for the support you all, currently crying writing this. It’s hard
item.dc:creator: ouhhmytralalamydingdingdong

item.title: Denver, April 19, 2025
item.description:
Speakers at the capitol before a jaunt through downtown.
Hilarious sign and props.
Asking permission to take photos common courtesy. Many people declined photos of their faces, but agreed to pose with signs or their flags with their backs turned. Asking is polite.
Lots of American flags, uncle Sam, lady liberty iconography. Cool seeing it at "left" leaning protests.
Pro tip: be a good person. A woman came over to this Christian group singing Easter songs that it "wasn't the time" (Easter?), "they look like they support Trump" "Jesus was a Jew and an immigrant, and Trump hates immigrants" Rule 1: be a good person. This group was an Ethiopian church, singing songs and praying for Easter. No politics. They weren't aware of the larger protest. They were lovely. Easter been around longer than Trump. The only one yelling at immigrants was her. The only one trying to impede 1st amendment rights was her. I was not recording the incident because it was negative. I crossed past her, shook my new friend Akleem's hand, hugged him and started chatting friendly with him. She left.
Billionaires are not like us
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist
